## Summary
- Describe what changed and why.

## Type of change
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] API contract/schema
- [ ] Mock data
- [ ] Backend stub
- [ ] Frontend placeholder
- [ ] Tooling/script
- [ ] Other (describe):

## Privacy impact
- Does this change collect, store, or expose additional telemetry?
- Confirm no raw webcam video is introduced.

## Data model impact
- [ ] No data model impact
- [ ] Contract/schema updated (list files)
- [ ] Sample data updated (list files)

## Testing notes
- List validation steps run (lint/tests/scripts/manual checks).

## Screenshots (if UI)
- Add before/after screenshots for UI changes.

## Checklist
- [ ] Does not store webcam video
- [ ] Does not overclaim gaze accuracy
- [ ] Updates docs if contracts changed
- [ ] Adds/updates sample data if event shapes changed
